name: Gorgonzola and Fresh Thyme Sauce for Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together cream, cheese, thyme, and nutmeg in a large skillet.
2. Cook gently over medium heat until the mixture reduces by one-fourth.
3. Add salt and pepper to taste.
4. Toss with pasta to coat well.
5. Serve with extra nutmeg, if desired.
